source_tags: Problem with duplicates. Check extent of pub.
Wheelchair access via side entrance to most if not all parts.

Primarily cobbled streets, with narrow footpaths, but low traffic levels and speeds. Steps in some areas can usually be bypassed. Buildings are generally older and smaller and may have entrance steps.
Much like an older street with named terraces on either side, this street is Mayor Street Lower, the development either side of it is George's Dock, named for the dock.
